name: io.github.dusk-network/pituitary
description: Catch spec drift before it catches you. Indexes your specs, docs, and decision records, then detects overlap, contradictions, stale docs, and code that drifts from what was decided.

tools.name: search_specs
tools.description: Semantic search across indexed spec sections. Filter by domain and status.

tools.name: check_overlap
tools.description: Detect specs that cover overlapping ground. Returns similarity scores and relationship classification.

tools.name: compare_specs
tools.description: Side-by-side tradeoff analysis of two specs.

tools.name: analyze_impact
tools.description: Trace which specs, code refs, and docs are affected when a spec changes.

tools.name: check_doc_drift
tools.description: Find docs that have gone stale relative to accepted specs, with cited evidence.

tools.name: review_spec
tools.description: Full composite review: overlap + comparison + impact + drift + remediation.
